expectations.evidence: Line 91-93: 'Regimen: TDF/3TC/DTG... No change indicated; viral load is suppressed. Continue throughout pregnancy, delivery, and postpartum (lifelong ART)'
Line 188: 'Viral load monitoring: Schedule repeat viral load at 34-36 weeks gestation to inform delivery planning' and line 213: 'Repeat viral load | 34-36 weeks gestation'

expectations.text: Infant prophylaxis or PMTCT planning mentioned
expectations.evidence: Lines 135-137: 'PMTCT Counseling - Continue ART throughout pregnancy, delivery, and postpartum... Infant ARV prophylaxis will be initiated at birth per national PMTCT guidelines. Infant HIV testing per national protocol (typically PCR at 6 weeks of age)'
Line 41: 'Hemoglobin | 10.8 g/dL | Mild anemia (WHO: 10.0-10.9 g/dL)' and line 53-54: 'Anemia — MILD ANEMIA. Hb 10.8 g/dL falls in the mild anemia range (10.0-10.9 g/dL)'

expectations.text: Standard iron/folate supplementation recommended alongside ART
expectations.evidence: Lines 85-87: 'Iron: 120 mg elemental iron daily (therapeutic dose for mild anemia)... Folic acid: 0.4 mg daily' prescribed alongside continued ART (line 91: 'Continue TDF/3TC/DTG'). Both listed in Next Steps table (line 210).
